allow: Bash(py -c "import qstash; print\('qstash version:', getattr\(qstash,'__version__','?'\)\); from qstash import Receiver, QStash; import inspect; print\('Receiver params:', list\(inspect.signature\(Receiver.__init__\).parameters\)\); print\('verify params:', list\(inspect.signature\(Receiver.verify\).parameters\)\)")
